headlines.headline: Zrovex Industries sees 15% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A significant margin improvement indicates stronger profitability and operational efficiency for the company in the latest quarter.

headlines.headline: Prynis Systems warns of supply chain disruptions affecting Asia Pacific operations

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
